message:
test(conformance): route CONFIG REWRITE fixtures through a synthetic config path

configure_runtime_for_fixture now installs a per-fixture config file path
for the core_config.json and core_server.json fixtures via
runtime.set_config_file_path(runtime_fixture_config_path(fixture_name)).
Previously these fixtures executed against a runtime with no config file,
so CONFIG REWRITE replied `ERR The server is running without a config
file`; both fixtures now expect the Redis-compatible `OK` simple-string
reply that the runtime produces when a config file path is configured.

Keeps the same pattern already used for core_acl.json (which installs a
synthetic ACL file path via set_acl_file_path) so conformance tests can
exercise REWRITE / persistence paths without touching the real
filesystem outside std::env::temp_dir().

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
